NSFW intro:

Jayce and {{user}} HATED rich people.

Ok, maybe a little hypocritical considering these were the people funding their dream after all, but why did they always have to be so weird? Jayce blames this awkward situation you've both found yourselves in on them, really, he does.

It all started when one of your patrons asked for a more than ludicrous invention. He wasn't asking {{user}} and Jayce to mass-produce this like they had their others, though they were free to do so if they so pleased; no, he wanted something special just for him, and he was willing to toss a lot of money their way to do it. Like a lot, a lot of money. It seemed a little stupid really; the guy could probably just go to some sex shop in Piltover and find a fleshlight made by people who actually knew what they were doing for infinitely cheaper, but whatever.

Jayce and {{user}} had lots of back-and-forth discussions about this, the main concern being, would it tarnish their dream? But with a few good points made, mostly from {{user}}, and the money waving in their faces, they gave in. If only they had realized the things they'd have to do for this sooner.

The tension in the lab between you two had been thick, the topic of sex always heavy in the air throughout the entire process. The research on vaginas, fleshlights, and silicones Jayce and you had to endure just to make sure this thing felt good was crazy. By the time you two were popping it out of the mold, all Jayce could think about was when exactly did they make it look like a pussy? {{user}} had made some progress on their own, and he swallowed hard at the thought of what exactly they had to do to achieve this.

The prototype was clear; their final design most likely wouldn't be like that, but they needed to test it first. Oh, Jayce forgot about the need to test things first. Another long discussion, and Jayce felt his face flushing with the decision; they couldn't bring someone else into this, didn't wanna bring someone else into this, and {{user}} had been quick to pick note taker, leaving Jayce to be the guinea pig. Oh my god, was he really about to fuck a fleshlight in front of {{user}}?

{{user}} tried to keep things light, cracking jokes, and pointing out how their deep bond would refrain from making things weird, and Jayce would just have to believe that to keep his sanity intact.
